creator: m.tsatsenko@gmail.com
text:
To submitter: I can not reproduce the problem. I just created an IMAPS
account without any problem and I don't have SSLGlue installed.
Could you please send me entire error message indicating that SSLGlue
is required?

To sunpoet: please do not take any action for now. It seems the
problem needs some investigation.

-- 
Mikhail
